data.name: RVAUnsupported
data.value: This metadata importer doesn't have a base address to resolve RVA address against.

data.name: ResolverMustSetAssemblyProperty
data.value: Resolver must set assembly property to this assembly.

data.name: ResolverMustResolveToValidModule
data.value: Resolver must resolve module reference to a valid module.

data.name: UnrecognizedAssemblyAttribute
data.value: Unrecognized assembly attribute: {0}.

data.name: ExtraInformationAfterLastParameter
data.value: More information left after last parameter is processed.

data.name: VersionAlreadyDefined
data.value: Version already defined.

data.name: TypeTokenExpected
data.value: Type token expected.

data.name: EscapeSequenceMissingCharacter
data.value: Escape sequence missing character after the backslash.

data.name: IllegalElementType
data.value: Illegal element type {0}.

data.name: ResolvedAssemblyMustBeWithinSameUniverse
data.value: Resolved assembly must be within the same universe.

data.name: ExpectedPositiveNumberOfGenericParameters
data.value: Expected positive number of generic parameters.

data.name: JaggedArrayInAttributeNotSupported
data.value: Jagged array in custom attributes is not supported.

data.name: ExpectedPropertyOrFieldId
data.value: Expected property or field ID.

data.name: InvalidMetadataSignature
data.value: Invalid metadata signature.

data.name: OperationValidOnArrayTypeOnly
data.value: This operation is valid on an array type only.

data.name: OperationValidOnRVAFieldsOnly
data.value: This operation is valid on RVA fields only.

data.name: ValidOnGenericParameterTypeOnly
data.value: Method may only be called on a Type for which Type.IsGenericParameter is true.

data.name: WindowsRuntimeTypeNotFound
data.value: Windows runtime type {0} cannot be found

data.name: UnsupportedImageType
data.value: Unsupported image type.

data.name: InvalidFileName
data.value: Invalid file name: "{0}".

data.name: MethodIsUsingUnsupportedBindingFlags
data.value: {0} is using unsupported binding flags {1}

data.name: CaseInsensitiveTypeLookupNotImplemented
data.value: Case insensitive type lookup is not implemented.

data.name: InvalidPublicKeyTokenLength
data.value: Length of public key token must be even.

data.name: CannotResolveModuleRefOnNetModule
data.value: Cannot resolve module reference on a single net module.

data.name: ManifestModuleMustBeProvided
data.value: Manifest module must be provided.

data.name: UnsupportedTypeInAttributeSignature
data.value: Unsupported type argument in custom attribute signature.

data.name: IncorrectElementTypeValue
data.value: Incorrect core element type value.

data.name: OperationInvalidOnAutoLayoutFields
data.value: This operation cannot be be applied to RVA fields with auto-layout.

data.name: CorruptImage
data.value: Image is corrupt. Attempting to read an out of range RVA.

data.name: InvalidMetadataToken
data.value: Invalid metadata token {0}.

data.name: ExpectedTokenType
data.value: {0} token expected.

data.name: MethodTokenExpected
data.value: Method token expected.

data.name: UnexpectedCharacterFound
data.value: Unexpected character found while parsing.

data.name: WrongNumberOfGenericArguments
data.value: Wrong number of generic arguments.

data.name: DifferentTokenResolverForOuterType
data.value: Outer type has different token resolver.

data.name: UnsupportedExceptionFlags
data.value: Unsupported exception flags {0}.

data.name: InvalidCustomAttributeFormat
data.value: Invalid custom attribute format.

data.name: InvalidCustomAttributeFormatForEnum
data.value: Invalid custom attribute blob. Enum parameters must have full type name specified.

data.name: CannotResolveRVA
data.value: Cannot resolve RVA.

data.name: CannotDetermineSystemAssembly
data.value: Type universe has not selected an assembly as the system assembly.

data.name: TypeArgumentCannotBeResolved
data.value: Type argument cannot be resolved.

data.name: OperationValidOnLiteralFieldsOnly
data.value: This operation can be applied to literal fields only.

data.name: IllegalLayoutMask
data.value: Illegal layout mask.

data.name: InvalidElementTypeInAttribute
data.value: Invalid core element type in custom attribute blob.

data.name: ExtraCharactersAfterTypeName
data.value: Extra characters after type name.

data.name: UniverseCannotResolveAssembly
data.value: Type universe cannot resolve assembly: {0}.

data.name: UnexpectedEndOfInput
data.value: Unexpected end of input.

data.name: ResolverMustResolveToValidAssembly
data.value: Resolver must resolve to a valid assembly.

data.name: OperationValidOnEnumOnly
data.value: This operation is valid on Enum types only.

data.name: ExtraAssemblyManifest
data.value: Non-manifest module contains assembly manifest or module is corrupted.

data.name: NoAssemblyManifest
data.value: Manifest module does not contain assembly manifest or module is corrupted.

data.name: InvalidFileFormat
data.value: Invalid file format.

data.name: DefaultTokenResolverRequired
data.value: Without an assembly qualified name, a default token resolver is required.

data.name: HostSpecifierMissing
data.value: Assembly qualified name requires a host.

data.name: ArrayInsideArrayInAttributeNotSupported
data.value: Arrays inside other arrays in custom attributes is not supported.

data.name: VarargSignaturesNotImplemented
data.value: Signatures with variable number of arguments are not implemented.

data.name: InvalidMetadata
data.value: Invalid metadata.

data.name: AssemblyRefTokenExpected
data.value: Assembly reference token expected.

data.name: CannotFindTypeInModule
data.value: Cannot find type {0} in module {1}.

data.name: IdTokenTypeExpected
data.value: Id token type expected.
